prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主 榜排名从2021年第68名持续上升至2026年第61名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力增强；2026年声誉偏负面（外卖管理争议为主，25条事件中23条中性、2条 负面），但整体影响有限；抖音热度较热（总排名第38位，评价"较热"），短视频平台关注度中等偏上，对报考热度有一定正向作用；心理学A、教育学A、马克 思主义理论A-，师范类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有吸引力；但物理类招生以工科、农科为主，优势学科与招生专业关联度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业持续高热推荐，西南大学物理类开设的计算机、电子信息、人工智能等专业契合市场热点；广西2026年考生总数约39.2万，按近年比例估算物 理类约26.9万人，较2025年增加约3.3%，竞争加剧；西南大学位于重庆，与广西同属西南地区，地域偏好较强；该校在广 西招生占比约2.1%–3.7%，属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年物理类大幅扩招约16%、广西考生总数增加约3.3%以及学校排名持续上升等因素，在 2025年基准31392名基础上，扩招效应主导位次后移；预测最低位次约34500名，区间34000–35000名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 21941 → 18174 → 16755 → 31392 (2025 baseline). In recent 3 years, the ranking shows a backward trend, with the 2025 baseline at about 31392. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 37 in 2021 → 43 in 2022 → 49 in 2023 → 58 in 2024 → 81 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 94, an increase of about 16% compared to 2025, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking rose from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing overall strength. In 2026, reputation is slightly negative (mainly due to food delivery management controversy, with 23 neutral and 2 negative out of 25 incidents), but overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 38th, evaluation 'relatively hot'), with moderate to high attention on short video platforms, positively affecting application heat. Psychology A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding normal (teacher training) disciplines, attracting applications to related majors. However, Physics Category enrollment mainly focuses on engineering and agriculture, with limited correlation between advantageous disciplines and enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. Southwest University's Physics Category offers Computer Science, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, etc., aligning with market hotspots. In 2026, Guangxi's total examinees are about 392,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 269,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Southwest University is located in Chongqing, in the same Southwest region as Guangxi, with strong regional preference. Its enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.1%–3.7%, at a moderate to high level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of Physics Category by about 16% in 2026, the increase in Guangxi examinees by about 3.3%, and the continuous rise in university ranking, the expansion effect dominates the backward shift in ranking based on the 2025 baseline of 31392. The predicted minimum ranking is about 34500, with a range of 34000–35000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 34000–35000, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 34000), focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If the ranking is near the upper limit (around 35000), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors at Rongchang Campus as safety, while also striving for Tier 2 majors at Beibei Campus.

The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 8 in 2021 → 19 in 2022 → 11 in 2023 → 11 in 2024 → 9 in 2025, with significant fluctuations. The 2026 plan is 9, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction effect.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with a continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the overall strength of the university. In 2026, the reputation is slightly negative (mainly due to the food delivery management controversy), but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 38th overall), with above-average attention on short video platforms. Psychology is rated A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, strongly attracting History Category candidates to apply for majors such as Education and Public Administration.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher-training/education majors is divided and wait-and-see; Law is recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended. History Category enrollment majors mainly include Public Administration, Journalism, Philosophy, etc., with moderate popularity. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase of about 3.3% in History Category candidates in Guangxi, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking, based on the 2025 baseline of 2552, the increase in candidates brings slight intensified competition, shifting the ranking slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2600, with a range of 2100–3100.
